findings.short_text: 50 objects have saved orbital perturbation results.
findings.title: Approximate orbital scenarios are available for priority objects

findings.short_text: Objects with the highest dispersion index deserve closer review in the orbital simulation view.
findings.title: Orbital uncertainty varies across the priority set

findings.caveat: The orbital simulation is approximate and uses available orbital elements.
findings.short_text: The lowest simulated p05 minimum-distance rows are useful as an inspection queue.
findings.title: Small p05 distance scenarios identify objects worth inspection
